programs.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report 3
programs.desc: Analysis of the most tragic accidents in the history of aviation.The investigation is based on reconstruction of events, photographic materials, accounts of survivors and rescuers, and computer graphics.

programs.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation
programs.desc: Another installment of the program about the adventures of daredevils who escaped from the hustle and bustle of civilization to the Alaskan wilderness.There they build their lives on their own terms.They must, among other things,prepare for winter.

programs.title: Destruction Decoded: Season 2
programs.desc: The creators of the program present shocking recordings that show man's clash with the power of the elements.The authors are looking for an answer to the question whether science will allow us to better prepare for disasters.

programs.title: Air Crash Investigation
programs.desc: Behind the scenes of the accident of KLM Cityhopper 433, which was on a routine flight from Amsterdam to Cardiff, Wales.Eleven minutes after takeoff, the crew reported an engine problem.Due to a faulty warning light, she assumed that the oil pressure was too low.The decision was made to return to the airport.Just before touchdown, the plane suddenly tilted to the right.The wing hit the ground.The plane crashed near the runway.Three people died, including the captain.Of the 21 survivors, 9 suffered serious injuries.An investigation by experts revealed an electrical fault.
